title: SACRAMENTO – Today, Assemblyman Gallagher (R-Yuba City), along with his Assembly Republican colleagues, called for an independent analysis of the cost and potential impacts of Demo
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Costs for previous single-payer proposals were estimated at $400 billion per year.
There has been no impartial analysis of AB 1400’s price tag.
A companion measure, ACA 11, is projected to increase taxes by more than $160 billion per year.
ACA 11 allows the Legislature to raise taxes further with a simple majority vote.
ACA 11 eliminates Prop. 13’s two-thirds vote requirement.
ACA 11 skirts education funding requirements that were approved by voters in Prop. 98.
